title: Policy: Create Policy while WiFi is turned off
scenario: Cloud policy created while WiFi is off is applied to device within seconds after WiFi reconnection, locking affected settings
steps: 1. Ensure the mobile device's WiFi is turned off.
2. On the Poly Cloud portal, create a new policy that disables and locks specific settings (e.g., ANC, Transparency Mode, Equalizer).
3. On the Poly Studio Mobile app, navigate to Home → [Device Name] → Device Settings.
4. Verify that the settings affected by the policy are currently enabled and unlocked (since WiFi is off).
5. Turn on the mobile device's WiFi and reconnect to the network.
6. Wait a few seconds for the policy to sync.
7. On the Poly Studio Mobile app, navigate to Home → [Device Name] → Device Settings.
8. Check the settings that were targeted by the policy (e.g., Audio Settings → ANC, Transparency Mode, Equalizer).
expected: The policy created on the Cloud is applied to the device within a few seconds after WiFi is reconnected. The settings affected by the policy become disabled and locked (grayed out) in the Poly Studio Mobile app.
